# agentops_worker_catalog (Data Source)

The catalog of hosted worker agents available to this account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Worker/agent templates available to deploy.
data "agentops_worker_catalog" "all" {}

output "ready_workers" {
  value = [for e in data.agentops_worker_catalog.all.entries : e.name if e.ready]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `entries` (Attributes List) Available worker catalog entries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--entries))

<a id="nestedatt--entries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `entries`

Read-Only:

- `category` (String) Category.
- `configurable_model` (Boolean) Whether the worker's model is configurable.
- `description` (String) Description.
- `docs_url` (String) Documentation URL.
- `id` (String) Catalog entry identifier.
- `missing_credentials` (List of String) Credentials that must be supplied before the worker can be deployed.
- `name` (String) Display name.
- `ready` (Boolean) Whether the catalog worker is ready to deploy.
- `status` (String) Status.
- `supports_chat` (Boolean) Whether the worker supports chat.
- `supports_mcp` (Boolean) Whether the worker supports MCP.
- `supports_triggers` (Boolean) Whether the worker supports triggers.
